arts.ttl: Man Utd Set for Bidding War to Sign ‘One of the Best Wing-Backs in the World’
arts.sum: Manchester United will have to beat Real Madrid in the race to sign Inter Milan's left wing-back Federico Dimarco.

arts.ttl: Sporting CP sack Ruben Amorim successor just one month after Man United move as replacement named
arts.sum: Sporting Lisbon have sacked Joao Pereira as their head coach after just eight matches and confirmed his successor

arts.ttl: Man Utd star confirms January transfer possibility
arts.sum: Ten Hag was never able to get the Brazil international to replicate the success that he enjoyed in Amsterdam, and with Ruben Amorim apparently having no place for him in his Man Utd revolution, agent Junior Pedroso has put the player firmly on the market. These clubs wanted to understand the situation for Antony, so I can confirm that there’s concrete interest,” the agent told Fabrizio Romano.

arts.ttl: Man United youngsters dealt major blow as Ruben Amorim promotion plan becomes clear
arts.sum: Lee Sharpe has warned that Manchester United's academy stars may have to alter their style of play to break into the first team under new manager Ruben Amorim.

arts.ttl: Man United make surprise decision on £85m flop Antony's future with 'concrete interest' from multiple clubs for a January move
arts.sum: Antony is yet to make a Premier League start this season, and has been limited to just two cameos off the bench in the league since Ruben Amorim replaced Erik ten Hag.

arts.ttl: Four Man United team news hints dropped ahead of Wolves as Marcus Rashford decision looms
arts.sum: Manchester United will face relegation-battlers Wolverhampton Wanderers in the return to Premier League action

arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim seeks to prolong remarkable Man Utd Boxing Day record since Sir Alex Ferguson
arts.sum: Ruben Amorim will take charge of his first Boxing Day match on Thursday as the 39-year-old's Manchester United side travel to fellow Premier League strugglers Wolves

arts.ttl: How to watch Wolves v Man Utd for free tonight - TV channel and kick-off time
arts.sum: You can watch the Premier League game free of charge this evening

arts.ttl: Manchester United: Sporting Lisbon make shock manager change only eight games after Ruben Amorim's departure
arts.sum: Portuguese giants forced into action after nightmare run

arts.ttl: Man Utd legend agrees with Marcus Rashford exit plan amid disinterested claim
arts.sum: Marcus Rashford is keen to explore a new challenge and one former Manchester United star reckons the time is right for player who has not shown enough energy for Ruben Amorim's gameplan
